title: Canonical Host Path Draft Packet History Demotion Execution
objective: Normalize the remaining live-looking 2026-05-03 Olares Phase 5 canonical host dev-path preparation packet-definition singleton so that file no longer presents itself as a still-live Olares canonical host dev-path preparation packet after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with an explicit current-routing redirect.
dependency_note: After Packet 265 closes the adjacent `olares-phase-5-006` singleton, the nearest remaining current-looking residue in the same Olares Phase 5 draft lane is the successor `olares-phase-5-007` canonical host dev-path preparation singleton. Its surrounding packet-history now serves only as provenance, so the packet-definition JSON itself is the strongest adjacent live-looking residue.
execution_scope: Retitle the `olares-phase-5-007` packet-definition singleton as historical provenance.
Add explicit `historical_note` and `current_routing` fields to the packet JSON.
Preserve the original packet body below those top-entry routing fields without reopening canonical host path preparation, host-path mutation, or migration scope.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing normalization
success_criteria: The `olares-phase-5-007` packet-definition singleton now reads as historical provenance instead of a live Olares canonical host dev-path preparation packet.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and leaves no ambiguity about the next remaining adjacent residue check.
next_action: Close the adjacent `olares-phase-5-008` singleton so the next remaining Olares Phase 5 residue is explicit after the `olares-phase-5-007` closure.
